title: Update RplRuntime, tests, and integration points for new liveness policy
description: Revise runtime_prunes_neighbor_only_after_literal_timeout test and RplRuntimeConfig/maintenance to use the new policy with 10s default. Ensure no Trickle violation on eviction. Update any other callers in rpl_stack.rs, node.rs. Add test for policy preventing eviction of active trickle neighbors.
